# 🎤 Artist Overview  
Vozz Rich is a dynamic electronic music producer and DJ with roots in Mexico and California, blending influences from Detroit house, underground raves, salsa, and techno into a signature sound that energizes dance floors worldwide. Known for his infectious beats and innovative remixes, Vozz Rich has established himself as a versatile artist in the electronic and house music scenes. His collaborations with acclaimed artists like L25 and PYM have further solidified his reputation as a rising star in the industry.  

# 📊 Performance & Draw  
- **Streaming Numbers:** Over 24,000 monthly listeners on Spotify, with consistent growth trends.  
- **Social Media Engagement:** 4,875 Instagram followers and a strong presence on SoundCloud.  
- **Geographic Popularity:** Primarily popular in the US, with a growing international fanbase.  

# 🎧 Recent Releases & Press  
- **Featured Tracks:**  
  - "Breathless" (with L25) – A melodic house anthem released July 2024.  
  - "Butterflies" (Remix) – A reimagined version of Artsychoke’s track, released May 2024.  
  - "Don’t Want It to End" – A club-ready hit with multiple remixes, released April 2024.  
- **Remix Work:** Notable remixes for Kelly Reverb & Chad LeMans’ "Let This One Ride" and Jaytor’s "Dance All Night."  
- **Playlist Inclusions:** Tracks featured on curated Spotify and Apple Music playlists, boosting visibility and streams.  

# 🎪 Stage Experience & Technical  
- **Performance Style:** High-energy DJ sets blending house, techno, and Latin influences.  
- **Technical Rider:** Requires professional-grade sound equipment and lighting for a fully immersive experience.  
- **Past Venues/Events:** Performed at underground raves and club events across California, gaining a loyal following.

Vozz Rich is ready to bring his electrifying sound to your stage—contact now to book your next unforgettable event!
